sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n42099" key="e)pwfe/leia" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐπωφέλ-εια</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n42099.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">help, advantage,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0161.tlg001:278" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Democr.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">278</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
